race.comment: ETCHED IN BLUE (4) improving gelding with his hoof on the till. Progressed nicely from a wide barrier with a tough on-pace second over 1400m at Ballarat Synthetic after being in contention on the turn. Can get the better of these today. ROYAL OVERTURE (10) relished the extra ground at her third race start with a gritty third over 1400m at Wagga on the heavy surface. A repeat effort will see her shape as the main danger. CHIEF OF WAR (1) thereabouts of late and is deep into the campaign. Surged late in the heavy going with a respectable fourth over 1400m at Wagga. Will go back again and be ridden for luck. Respect. BROKEN IMAGE (8) has two placings from five outings this campaign and finished 6 lengths off the winner last start at Swan Hill. In the mix on best.
